scripts.emulators:kill: lsof -ti :9099 -ti :8080 -ti :9199 -ti :4000 -ti :4400 -ti :4500 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null; echo '✅ Emuladores detenidos'
scripts.deploy:preview: git switch monorepo-dev && git pull origin monorepo-dev && git push origin monorepo-dev
scripts.deploy:main: git switch monorepo-dev && git switch monorepo &&git merge monorepo-dev  && git push origin monorepo && git switch monorepo-dev
